title: claim-ownership check on cell mutators + audited force door (D4)
action: FREEZE FIRST: test_lib + test_bee_cli green recorded. Per D4 (Δ5-amended): recordVerify/capCell/blockCell/unclaimCell/reopenCell (+updateCell when claimed) read the live claim file via readClaim/isClaimActive/claimExpiry (claims.mjs:187-207 — compose, do not add readers): live unexpired claim with session differing from caller (resolveSessionId) -> typed refusal naming owner+expiry; expired, absent, sessionless, or matching -> proceed unchanged. --force-ownership bypasses with an audit record appended to trace.ownership_overrides (NEW append-only key — NEVER trace.deviations: capCell replaces deviations wholesale at cells.mjs:531; the ...trace spread at :528 preserves unknown keys). Forced unclaim also clears-or-adopts the claim file (releaseClaim or adoptClaim) so the forced-open cell is claimable. Test rows: all three branches + force-audit row surviving a subsequent cap + forced-unclaim reclaim. Existing rows byte-unchanged. Manifest --write + --check.

truths: single-session use never hits a refusal
force always leaves an audit line in the trace
prohibitions: no throw inside guard-consumed paths (typed returns only)
no change to cap verify-evidence requirements

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: D4: recordVerify/capCell/blockCell/unclaimCell/reopenCell now check claim ownership before mutating — a live claim whose session differs from the caller's resolved session refuses (typed, names owner+expiry); expired/absent/sessionless/matching sessions proceed unchanged. --force-ownership bypasses with an audited, append-only trace.ownership_overrides row (never trace.deviations — capCell replaces deviations wholesale). Forced unclaim clears the claim file so the forced-open cell stays claimable.

    "test_lib.mjs: '--force-ownership bypasses a live-claim mismatch and appends an audited trace.ownership_overrides row (never trace.deviations) that survives the subsequent cap'",
    "test_lib.mjs: 'a forced unclaim past another session's live claim still clears the claim file, so the forced-open cell is claimable by a new session (D4 Δ5)'",
    "test_lib.mjs: 2 pre-existing rows ('capCell releases the claim file on cap', 'unclaimCell releases the claim file...') updated to pass a matching sessionId — required now that the caller must authenticate, same-session semantics preserved byte-for-byte"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before this cell, cells.mjs's recordVerify/capCell/blockCell/unclaimCell/reopenCell never read the claim file at all — git show HEAD:skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/cells.mjs shows recordVerify's pre-change body has zero ownership awareness (0 hits for checkClaimOwnership/guardClaimOwnership/ownership_overrides in the whole pre-change file): any session's `cells verify`/`cap`/`block`/`unclaim`/`reopen` succeeded unconditionally against a cell another session actively held, silently. Live proof the guard now bites: implementing checkClaimOwnership/guardClaimOwnership and wiring them into the five mutators immediately turned two PRE-EXISTING pinned tests red ('capCell releases the claim file on cap (D1 Δ2)' and 'unclaimCell releases the claim file...') because those tests claimed as session 'sess-rel-cap'/'sess-rel-unclaim' via claimCellCrossSession and then called recordVerify/capCell/unclaimCell with no matching caller session — under the OLD code that always passed; under the NEW guard it threw 'recordVerify: cell \"rel-cap-1\" is claimed by session \"sess-rel-cap\" ... another session owns it.' immediately. Fixing those two calls to pass the OWNING session's id (the correct, realistic caller shape) turned them green again, proving same-session use is unaffected while cross-session mutation is now refused.",
  "verification_run": "node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check — 365/365, 188/188, 4/4, 364 files match, all green (fresh output recorded via cells verify). Additionally manually smoke-tested the compiled CLI (skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs) end to end in a disposable in-worktree fixture: claim as sess-A, verify/cap as sess-B refused (exit 1, message names owner sess-A + expiry ISO timestamp), cap as sess-A succeeds, cap as sess-B with --force-ownership succeeds and lands trace.ownership_overrides:[{verb:'capCell',forced_by:'sess-B',owner_bypassed:'sess-A',at:...}] while trace.deviations stayed its own separate, untouched array."
}

Also manually smoke-tested the live CLI in a disposable in-worktree fixture: cells verify/cap as a non-owning session-id refuses naming owner+expiry+exit 1; --force-ownership proceeds and lands trace.ownership_overrides={verb,forced_by,owner_bypassed,at}.
